jobs.title: Technical Product Support (TPS) Engineer II - (SCoE) (E2)
jobs.description:
Who We Are

 Applied Materials is a global leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world. We design, build and service cutting-edge equipment that helps our customers manufacture display and semiconductor chips – the brains of devices we use every day. As the foundation of the global electronics industry, Applied enables the exciting technologies that literally connect our world – like AI and IoT. If you want to push the boundaries of materials science and engineering to create next generation technology, join us to deliver material innovation that changes the world. 

 What We Offer

 Location:
Hsinchu,TWN, Tainan,TWN
 You’ll benefit from a supportive work culture that encourages you to learn, develop, and grow your career as you take on challenges and drive innovative solutions for our customers. We empower our team to push the boundaries of what is possible—while learning every day in a supportive leading global company. Visit our Careers website to learn more. 

 At Applied Materials, we care about the health and wellbeing of our employees. We’re committed to providing programs and support that encourage personal and professional growth and care for you at work, at home, or wherever you may go. Learn more about our benefits . 

 Key Responsibilities
 Responsible for Sustainability (SCoE) Products
 Provides systems support for engineering systems in applications or reliability labs.  Supports engineering owners by working on assigned projects in conjunction with vendors, or suppliers.
 Acts as intermediary between customer and factory by providing technical support and documentation to field engineers, technicians, and product support personnel who are diagnosing, troubleshooting, repairing, and debugging equipment. 
 Provides Beta Site Support; mainly for qualifying the new applied installation, secondly for providing the technical training to our outsourcing engineers on installation and operation
 Presents system performance data as required. This includes performance metrics such as Uptime, MTBF, MTBI, Availability, equipment, and process parameters. 
 Supports GPS in the generation of documentation such as CENs and BKMs.  Creates and reviews documentation covering technical improvements, system upgrades, and support plans.   Presents at the engineering level.

 Qualification
 Above 5 years working experience in the semiconductor industry
 Preferred to have 2 years equipment experience in Applied Materials, any tool experience is acceptable
 Able to suppot domestic travel frequently (25-30%), and 10% global support
 Flexible on work location in Taiwan

 Job will support multiple customers with a focus on Taiwan Accounts.

 Additional Information

 Time Type:
Full time
 Employee Type:
Assignee / Regular
 Travel:
Yes, 25% of the Time
 Relocation Eligible:
No

 Applied Materials is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, national origin, citizenship, ancestry, religion, creed, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, veteran or military status, or any other basis prohibited by law.

 The Technical Product Support (TPS) Engineer plays a critical role in delivering advanced technical support for the products of MDP (Metal Deposition Products) group . Th is position is responsible for ensuring optimal fleet performance, managing escalations, and supporting system installations, upgrades, and continuous improvement programs across TSMC fabs . The role requires strong problem-solving skills, close collaboration with global teams, and the ability to lead technical failure analysis for high-impact issues.
 Work location is flexible within Taiwan, with up to 30% domestic and 15% international travel to support TSMC customer sites.

 Provides systems support for engineering systems in applications or reliability labs.  Supports engineering owners by working on assigned projects in conjunction with vendors, or suppliers.
 Acts as intermediary between customer and factory by providing   technical support and documentation to field engineers, technicians and product support personnel who are diagnosing, troubleshooting, repairing and debugging equipment.

 Qualifications
 Minimum 5 years in the semiconductor industry, preferably with deposition (CVD, ALD, PVD) and etching processes. Experience supporting TSMC customers is a strong plus.
 Proven ability to lead technical failure analysis for high-value problems (HVP) using DOE or other structured problem-solving methodologies, driving issues to resolution.
 Strong English communication skills, both verbal and written, to effectively collaborate across global teams and with customers.
 Ability to support 30% domestic travel across Taiwan customer sites and up to 15% international travel.

jobs.title: Lead Imaging Embedded Software Engineer  (Contractor)
jobs.description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.

 The Role:
 The Lead Imaging Embedded Software Engineer is responsible for Video Conference Cameras installed in office meeting rooms and open work spaces. 

 You will be tasked with developing, maintaining, and enhancing the embedded camera BSP platform on which the camera ISP Pipeline software and image processing algorithms run and deliver the video streams. 

 Your Contribution:
 Be Yourself. Be Open. Stay Hungry and Humble. Collaborate. Challenge. Decide and just Do. These are the behaviors you’ll need for success at Logitech. In this role you will:
 Responsible for Camera BSP software components
 Developing camera ISP pipeline software and drivers for our specific product requirements
 Modifying and enhancing Android Camera HAL and Linux Camera API 
 Developing Android Apps and Services, and Linux Applications for accessing our specific camera features
 Maintaining Code Repos which requires proficiency in code review, merging, and using Gerrit or GitHub
 Managing code branching, merging and code conflict resolutions 

 Your theoretical knowledge and hands-on expertise in camera software will be applied to the development of our camera subsystem resulting in optimized and balanced performance.

 Key Qualifications:
 We welcome candidates with strong knowledge and experience camera BSP software stack development. 
 For consideration, you must bring the following minimum skills and behaviors to our team:
 Working knowledge of camera BSP software development
 Android or Linux Environment software development experience
 C / C++ / Java / Python
 Camera ISP pipeline embedded software experience, especially for key SOC suppliers, is highly desirable
 Camera API and App programming experience a definite plus  
 Basic knowledge in embedded ISP algorithms: pixel processing, 3A, image enhancement, Auto Scene Detection, etc. a plus

 Education:
 MSc Computer Science or equivalent with 8+ years of relevant working experience, or
 BSc Computer Science or equivalent with 10+ years of relevant working experience

 We will also consider candidates with less experience at Senior Engineer or Engineer Level but with strong interests in learning and entering the field of camera software BSP.  

 Strong communication and collaboration skills, able to work with team members, troubleshoot issues, and provide recommendations.

jobs.title: Lead Mechanical Engineer
jobs.description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.

 The Team and Role:
 We are currently looking for a hands-on Mechanical Lead who thrives in technical details. You will be in the CAD daily, solving complex engineering challenges and ensuring our Video Collaboration products achieve a premium look and feel.

 Through your leadership, you leverage your technical expertise to design and analyze products and related data, develop and improve manufacturing and supportive processes, and provide consultation to vendors, JDM/ODM manufacturers, and internal teams. Manage resources and activities to lead complex projects to completion.

 You will be the primary mechanical owner for major subsystems, translating ID concepts into mass-producible realities using expert-level Creo skills. Furthermore, you will serve as  a technical anchor and mentor for junior engineers, for working with suppliers.

 Your Contribution:
 Be Yourself. Be Open. Stay Hungry and Humble. Collaborate. Challenge. Decide and just Do. Share our passion for Equality and the Environment. These are the behaviors and values you’ll need for success at Logitech. In this role you will:
 Design & Analysis: Designing, analyzing, documenting, and testing complex mechanical parts and assemblies,​ including the use of appropriate analysis tools for critical areas.

 Quality & Optimization: Ensuring final designs meet objectives for quality, cost, and user experience, while achieving specifications for reliability, manufacturability, and ESD containment. This includes partnering with Manufacturing teams and Suppliers to optimize designs for mass production.

 Problem Resolution: Effectively resolving mechanical engineering issues and challenges.

 Tooling & Development: Leading the development and qualification of plastic tooling, including design debug.

   Strategic Input: Contributing to the Technology Roadmap and developing and implementing modules, designs, or platforms.

  Process Improvement: Improving existing working systems and processes.

   Mentorship: Providing regular coaching and mentoring to junior team members.

   Collaboration: Partnering and collaborating with other worldwide functions to achieve seamless product development.

 Key Qualifications:
For consideration, you must bring the following minimum skills and experiences to our team:
 Master / Bachelor in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent.

 8+ years experience in mechanical design/development of high volume consumer electronic products.

 Strong product front end experience with a demonstrated track record collaborating with cross functional teams to idealize feasible solutions to enable great products.

 Strong knowledge in various manufacturing processes and able to identify the most suitable process according to part requirements.

 Possess methodology for new technology (material, process, etc.) study and capable of developing & implementing these for new feature/function requirements on a product.

 Good knowledge of plastic, tooling, injection molding, assemble process, cosmetic finishes, and defect analysis.

 Good knowledge in metal punch tool structure and design.

 Good Creo and Ansys skills.

 Strong problem solving skills.

 Strong in risk management.

 Advanced Knowledge of quality tools such as DFMEA, DFMA, DoE and Tolerance analysis.

 Fluent prototyping skills.

 Good understanding of Project Management principles.

 CAE is a MUST.

 Strong team leader.

 Taking initiative at work.

 Creative and self-motivated.

 Good command of English writing and speaking, and ability to make files for presentations.

 Preferred Qualifications
 Audio/Video product experience working with global suppliers/vendors (ODM, JDM, CM models)

 Flexibility and comfort working in a fast paced environment. Availability to travel (up to 30%)

 Education
 Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related field.

jobs.title: Lead Material Engineer
jobs.description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.

 The Team and Role:
 Are you ready to join a team involved with designing exciting products for a great company? Logitech is now looking for a Lead CMF Engineer to join the team in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

 Your contributions:
 Be Yourself. Be Open. Stay Hungry and Humble. Speak up. Collaborate. Challenge. Decide and just Do. These are the behaviors you’ll need for success at Logitech. In this role you will:
 Implement & conduct innovation ideas for Logitech, lead and/or support CMF technology projects to enable products and our customer diversity, inclusivity, sustainability and customization

 Partner with product marketing/ID/ME/CMF design, perform CMF engineering design of new products: DFM, GD&T, SPC, DOE, perform materials selection, trial and qualification, painting / printing / plating and other CMF process trials, troubleshooting on-site, support product projects

 Manage / partner with molding and CMF related suppliers to ensure smooth CMF process ramp-up and MP for NPI

 Provide CMF consulting, training and support to Hsinchu site (ME, QA, Commodity, PMs...)

 Support on-going supplier audit for new tech, cost-down on existing tech...

 Key Qualifications:
 For consideration, you must bring the following skills and behaviors to our team:
 Technical competence
 Creative CMF engineering design in the early phase of product concept with design, marketing, operation and other engineers. Synthesize and present data and ideas logically.

 Keeper of the engineering design quality to enable CMF process capability in trials and MP, solving problems systematically throughout define, approve, develop, qualify new CMF.

 Familiar with materials knowhow & technology (plastic, metal, composites, flexible technology and so on). Experienced in color/appearance management techniques and Finishing techniques like printing, painting, IMD,...

 Skilled auditor according to ISO, maintain a pro-active partnership with key CMF suppliers

 Personal competence
 Fluent English (reading, speaking and writing), Chinese a plus

 Good communication skills as the CMF consultant, CMF technical influencer

 Attention to details and flexible in a fast-moving environment

 Being able to work efficiently in a global, multi-cultural team

 Willing to travel

 Able to work with overseas suppliers

 Education
 University degree, equivalent or above

 Training in one of the following specialties or related: chemistry, physics, chemical engineering, materials science and engineering, printing technology, mechanical engineering

 Experience (minimum)
 5 years experiences as a CMF/ME engineer

 5 years experience in electronics, sports goods or related industries: molding, painting, printing, plastic decoration

 3 year experience in managing suppliers in high volume production, small batch manufacturing a plus

 3 years experience working as a project engineer

jobs.title: Senior Signal Integration Engineer
jobs.description:
Logitech is the Sweet Spot for people who want their actions to have a positive global impact while having the flexibility to do it in their own way.

 Your Contribution:
Be Yourself. Be Open. Stay Hungry and Humble. Collaborate. Challenge. Decide and just Do. Share our passion for Equality and the Environment. These are the behaviors and values you’ll need for success at Logitech. In this role you will:
 Familiar with  the schematic and layout tool such as Allegro and OrCad

 Conduct PCB board level including ME construction signal integrity (SI) analysis using Sigrity, Ansys or  similar tools to address high-speed design challenges.

 Build accurate, fast power aware S-parameter models for design interconnects to be used in broader system simulations.

 Analyzed and optimized the Power Delivery Network (PDN) using AC frequency analysis as well as pre-layout and post-layout simulations to adhere to PDN requirements at the lowest possible cost.

 Analyzed near-field E/H densities and radiation effects as well as the impact of external radiation to easily identify problematic EMI radiating devices, determine necessary shielding and faraday cage placement, and evaluate overall system susceptibility.

 Key Qualifications:
 Proficiency in the Sigrity X platform , including PowerSI and SystemSI or similar tools

 Strong foundation in S-parameters, crosstalk, jitter, and decoupling capacitor optimization.

 Deep understanding of system architecture  including multiple layers PCB , complicated Via construction , digital high speed interface like HDMI, USB , MIPI,PCIe and Ethernet.

 Ability to analyze and debug critical signal issues in real-time and correlate simulation data with physical hardware. 

 Coordinate with development team to highlight the design weakness and provided the solution

 Professional Qualifications:
 Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or a related technical discipline.

 5+ years of experience in Electronics circuit or high-speed hardware design for middle to high density product 

 5+ year of simulation tools hands on experience

 Knowledge and experience with server-side development using Django.

 Basic knowledge and experience in machine learning.

jobs.title: AI Product Intern (B2C & User Growth) - ScamAdviser
jobs.description:
About us

 Gogolook is a leading TrustTech company founded in 2012 and listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange in 2025 under the stock code 6902. With "Build for Trust" as its core value, the company has expanded its business from Asia to Europe and America. Gogolook’s AI technology is built on the world's largest database of digital scam data, encompassing phone numbers, websites, virtual currency wallet addresses, and other factors.

 The company provides diverse anti-scam and fintech services for both consumers and businesses. Its anti-scam offerings include the digital anti-scam app "Whoscall" and a range of enterprise scam prevention solutions in combination with "ScamAdviser."

 The Fintech BU empowers consumers through data-driven financial services and inclusive lending: Roo.Cash（袋鼠金融）offers transparent matchmaking for financial products like credit cards, while JUJI（招財麻吉）provides an innovative microloan service for rapid, convenient funding during urgent financial needs.

 A foundation member of the Global Anti-Scam Alliance (GASA), Gogolook has also teamed up with a number of institutes such as the Taiwan National Police Agency Criminal Investigation Bureau, the Financial Supervisory Service of South Korea, Thai Royal Police, the Fukuoka city and Shibuya City government, the Philippines Cybercrime Investigation and Coordinating Center, and the Royal Malaysia Police and state government to fight scam, dedicated to creating a "scam-free environment."

 Why you should join Gogolook

 Influential products: What we make are meaningful products that create values for society and defend against frauds.

 Emphasize self-growth: We encourage technical community activities, subsidize tickets for conferences and workshops so that learning is continuously supported by the company.

 Unleash your talent: We respect the professional opinions of everyone, encourage team members to discuss with each other, and make awesome products together.

 Transparent culture: We publicly share the company's information to all, every member can read and feedback, and become a part of participating in the proposal.

 ScamAdviser 作為全球知名的防詐騙指標網站與服務，致力於保護全球消費者免受網路詐騙威脅。隨著 ScamAdviser 服務版圖的擴張，我們目前的 核心戰略極度聚焦於「B2C User Growth（使用者成長）」 。

 為了加速獲客（Acquisition）、提升活躍度（Activation）與留存率（Retention），我們正積極將 AI 技術導入消費者端產品中。加入這個團隊，你將站在 ScamAdviser 全球千萬級流量的肩膀上，參與 B2C 產品的早期探索與成長駭客（Growth Hacking）實驗。你的使命是透過 AI 與快速開發工具，打造能吸引並留住使用者的防詐產品體驗，將影響力直接擴及全球消費者。

 Role Overview:
 你將與 Product Manager、Growth 團隊及跨職能團隊緊密合作，扮演一個 Growth-driven Builder / Experimenter 。 從消費者痛點與增長目標出發，你將運用 AI 輔助開發（Vibe coding）與無程式碼工具，快速打造 0→1 的產品 MVP。這不是一個只需要寫研究報告的角色，你必須捲起袖子親自動手，在「提出假設 ➔ 打造 MVP ➔ 投入市場 ➔ 從數據中快速驗證與修正 ➔ 再次迭代」的無盡循環中，協助團隊找到引爆 User Growth 的產品契機。
\n

 Responsibilities
 0 → 1 B2C MVP 建立與快速實作

 運用 Vibe coding（如 Claude Code、Anti-Gravity、Cursor、GitHub Copilot）與 No-code/Low-code 工具，在短時間內高效率的從零打造直接面向消費者（C-end）的產品 MVP 或 Prototype。

 將增長點子具體化為：

 Pitch proposal（目標客群痛點、解法、增長假設）。

 User flow 與介面原型設計（著重於降低跳出率與提升轉換率）。

 實際可上線測試、可讓真實 User 互動的 MVP。

 專注 User Growth 的市場驗證與迭代

 配合增長目標，規劃並執行 MVP 的市場驗證（如：A/B Testing、Landing Page 測試、假門測試 Fake Door Test）。

 擁抱「反覆的市場測試與迭代」：追蹤使用者行為漏斗，根據真實使用者的點擊、留存與回饋，毫不留情地推翻錯誤假設，並立刻進行下一次優化。

 協助產出實驗結論：提供 Go / No-go 建議、優化使用者旅程（User Journey）策略。

 用戶行為數據分析與洞察

 協助定義並追蹤關鍵增長指標（如 DAU/MAU, Conversion Rate, Retention Rate）。

 進行基礎數據清理與漏斗分析（Excel / Google Sheets / Amplitude 或其他分析工具）。

 從數據中挖掘消費者行為洞察，轉化為下一個產品 MVP 的實驗靈感。

 文件與溝通

 撰寫並維護輕量級的文件：MVP 說明、簡易 PRD、A/B 測試實驗設計與結果覆盤。

 在快節奏的環境中，確保跨團隊（產品、行銷、工程）對增長實驗的目標與進度保持對齊。

 Requirements

 對 B2C 產品與消費者心理有極高熱情 ，日常喜歡研究各類 App / 網站是如何吸引人、如何做 onboarding。

 具備基本 Vibe coding / No-code / Low-code 經驗（不要求是工程師，但必須不怕看 code、能靠 AI 寫出可動的 prototype）。

 具備強大的心理素質，熱愛 0→1 的過程，能接受快速迭代、習慣失敗，不害怕把昨天做好的東西整個砍掉重練。

 對「數據驅動（Data-driven）」有基本概念，熟悉 Google Workspace、Excel / Google Sheets 數據處理。

 能快速學習新工具，在不確定性極高、沒有標準答案的情境下，主動尋找解法並動手嘗試。

 能獨立作業，同時樂於與 PM、設計、工程師進行高頻率的溝通與協作。

 Nice to Have

 曾嘗試開發面向消費者的 Side project、Prototype 或簡單產品（若有作品集或 GitHub 連結請務必附上）。

 了解 Growth Hacking（成長駭客）基礎框架（如 AARRR 漏斗模型）。

 有經營自媒體、社群，或參與過獲取 C 端用戶（User Acquisition）相關專案的經驗。

 修過或自學過以下領域：產品管理、使用者心理學、行為經濟學、資料分析。

 曾參與產品或創業型學生專案、Hackathon / 競賽。

 熟悉 AI 生產力工具（如 ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor 等）的深度應用。

 What You’ll Get

 第一線的 B2C 實戰戰場 ：實際參與 ScamAdviser 全球市場的 User Growth 決策，見證你的 MVP 如何影響真實用戶數據（非僅行政支援）。

 專家帶領的 AI & Growth Training ：視情況提供由資深產品專家帶領的 Vibe coding 與產品增長培訓，傳授最前沿的實戰方法論。

 豐富的工具與資源 ：提供必要的 AI 開發與數據分析工具，助你將瘋狂的增長點子化為現實。

 近距離 Mentoring ：與資深 Product Manager / Growth Hacker 緊密合作，學習如何用數據做決策、如何設計實驗，快速累積 B2C 產品的實戰 Sense。

 工作安排

 每週工時 ：每週 3-4 天

 出勤方式 ：每週至少 2 天進辦公室，其餘可遠端

 合約期間 ：半年

 薪資 ：NTD $230~$250 / 小時

\n NT$230 - NT$250 an hour
\n

jobs.title: Content Marketing Intern 內容行銷實習生 (Roo)
jobs.description:
About us

 Gogolook is a leading TrustTech company founded in 2012 and listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange in 2025 under the stock code 6902. With "Build for Trust" as its core value, the company has expanded its business from Asia to Europe and America. Gogolook’s AI technology is built on the world's largest database of digital scam data, encompassing phone numbers, websites, virtual currency wallet addresses, and other factors.

 The company provides diverse anti-scam and fintech services for both consumers and businesses. Its anti-scam offerings include the digital anti-scam app "Whoscall" and a range of enterprise scam prevention solutions in combination with "ScamAdviser."

 The Fintech BU empowers consumers through data-driven financial services and inclusive lending: Roo.Cash（袋鼠金融）offers transparent matchmaking for financial products like credit cards, while JUJI（招財麻吉）provides an innovative microloan service for rapid, convenient funding during urgent financial needs.

 A foundation member of the Global Anti-Scam Alliance (GASA), Gogolook has also teamed up with a number of institutes such as the Taiwan National Police Agency Criminal Investigation Bureau, the Financial Supervisory Service of South Korea, Thai Royal Police, the Fukuoka city and Shibuya City government, the Philippines Cybercrime Investigation and Coordinating Center, and the Royal Malaysia Police and state government to fight scam, dedicated to creating a "scam-free environment."

 Why you should join Gogolook

 Influential products: What we make are meaningful products that create values for society and defend against frauds.

 Emphasize self-growth: We encourage technical community activities, subsidize tickets for conferences and workshops so that learning is continuously supported by the company.

 Unleash your talent: We respect the professional opinions of everyone, encourage team members to discuss with each other, and make awesome products together.

 Transparent culture: We publicly share the company's information to all, every member can read and feedback, and become a part of participating in the proposal.

 Missions:

 Gogolook 旗下金融科技品牌「袋鼠金融 Roo.Cash 」提供市場上最新的金融商品資訊並透過特點分析與比較拉近民眾與金融商品的距離。「內容行銷實習生」將協助團隊一同發想內容企劃，並以新穎的方式讓更多人認識我們，並收集使用者反饋，將產品不斷延伸與演進。

 1. 內容策劃：與團隊一同發想符合 SEO 的內容行銷策略，帶動部落格自然流量成長

 2. 流量經營：與團隊一同追蹤部落格流量表現，並針對不同內容主題執行流量優化專案

 3. 數據回饋：學習於不同工具所提供的數據中抓出市場脈絡，並將數據用於未來產品與內容企劃中

 Requirements:

 1. 對金融商品及生活理財具有興趣

 2. 熟悉或願學習 SEO 關鍵字基礎，並用於內容規劃

 3. 喜愛文字創作並熱於分享，熟悉各論壇與社群平台

 4. 長期關注 AI 工具的發展，並有實際操作運用在內容生產的經驗

 5. 自主性，並持續學習，擁有極高求知慾

 6. 時間管理大師，追求自己準時達成任務

 7. 謹慎細心，對資訊細節追根究底

 Nice to have:

 1. 擁有自架網站經驗

 2. 擁有 wordpress、medium 等網站文章上稿經驗

 3. 熟悉 Google Analytics 等網站流量分析工具

 4. 熟悉 HTML 語言

 5. 對於 AI 工具願意主動了解，並且能串聯完成半/全自動化的影音及內容生產，例如 ChatGPT, Canva, Notion AI 等等

 6. 了解 Youtube 後台操作與 Youtube SEO 演算法，有經營影音內容相關經驗或高度興趣

 7. 熟悉財經和民生消費類型 YouTube 頻道、IG、Thread、Tiktok、小紅書相關網紅

 【上班時間 】週一至週五平日，一週至少配合 3 天以上，實習時長至少可配合 6 個月。可以彈性遠端工作。
\n

\n NT$196 - NT$196 an hour
\n

 Gogolook 是一家專注於防詐騙、數位金融領域的軟體公司。

 品牌視覺設計實習生 將協助品牌設計師以及創意總監一同經營品牌形象。

 視覺與設計整合能力： 具備良好的視覺構圖能力與品牌設計敏感度，能將品牌風格延伸至不同設計產出，並結合社群趨勢與品牌定位，獨立完成具吸引力的視覺設計，具備基礎版面配置（layout）能力

jobs.title: Senior Design Engineer, Coherent High Speed Interconnect
jobs.description:
NVIDIA is looking for a Senior Design Engineer for our Coherent High Speed Interconnect team! The NVLINK-C2C enables the creation of a new class of integrated products with NVIDIA partners, built via chiplets, allowing NVIDIA GPUs, DPUs, and CPUs to be coherently interconnected with custom silicon. To learn more about NVIDIA's ultra-fast chip interconnect technology visit:  https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/nvlink-c2c/ . This position offers the opportunity to have real impact in a dynamic, technology-focused company impacting product lines ranging from consumer graphics to self-driving cars and the growing field of artificial intelligence. We have crafted a team of outstanding people stretching around the globe, whose mission is to push the frontiers of what is possible today and define the platform for the future of computing.

 What You'll be Doing:
 Work on architecture and design of our state-of-the-art high speed coherent interconnects (NVLINK-C2C) for our mobile SoCs and GPUs.

 Collaborate with architects, external partners, software engineers, and circuit designers to deliver a class leading high speed coherent interconnect. 

 O ptimize design based on features, requirements, and system limitations”

 What We Need to See:
 BS or equivalent experience in Electrical Engineering or Computer Engineer or related degree required.

 5+ years or relevant design experience and knowledge in architecture, RTL design, performance analysis and power optimization.

 Knowledge of industry standard interconnect protocols like PCIE, CXL, AXI, CHI will be useful.

 Strong working knowledge of Verilog or System Verilog.

 Good communication skills and interpersonal skills are required.

 Ways to stand out from the crowd:
 Master or PhD degree will be a preferred.

 A history of mentoring junior engineers and interns a huge plus.

 With competitive salaries and a generous benefits package, NVIDIA is widely considered to be one of the most desirable employers in the world. We have some of the most brilliant and talented people in the world working for us. If you are creative, autonomous and love a challenge, we want to hear from you. We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

Time type: Full time

Job requisition id: JR2013905

jobs.title: Facilities Document Control Program Engineer
jobs.description:
Our vision is to transform how the world uses information to enrich life for all .
 Micron Technology is a world leader in innovating memory and storage solutions that accelerate the transformation of information into intelligence, inspiring the world to learn, communicate and advance faster than ever.

 We are looking for a highly motivated Document Controller to join our team and ensure effective management of project documentation for large-scale semiconductor projects. This role will be responsible for developing and implementing document control guidelines and procedures, while providing leadership and support to project teams to ensure successful execution and compliance.

 Document Control & Compliance
 Manage company documents to ensure accuracy, quality, and integrity; support compliance with record retention policies, safeguard information, and enable efficient data retrieval.

 Archive inactive records securely and systematically.

 Ensure document management processes meet company procedures and audit requirements.

 Establish and monitor records retention schedules in alignment with company policies.

 Maintain confidentiality of sensitive documents and oversee secure destruction and disposal processes.

 Document Management Systems
 Administer document management systems and related software platforms, ensuring functionality and promptly coordinating with IT or relevant teams to resolve issues.

 Update and maintain document management systems and physical records, including converting hard copies to electronic formats as required.

 Report and resolve issues related to document storage and management systems.

 Standardization & Process Development
 Develop and standardize document management procedures for consistent implementation across all construction projects.

 Maintain document naming and numbering conventions to ensure consistency and traceability.

 Design templates for documents, file types, and document databases to streamline workflows.

 Document Handling & Distribution
 Retrieve and distribute documents upon request, ensuring timely and accurate delivery.

 Register and track all documents, including technical and non-technical materials such as drawings, blueprints, and specifications, in a centralized log.

 Maintain logs and checklists for transmittals, submittals, RFIs, punch lists, defect lists, lessons learned, and other project documentation.

 Collaborate with contractors, vendors, and internal stakeholders to issue and transmit requested documents efficiently.

 Control document flow within and outside the department to maintain process integrity.

 Training & Support
 Develop and update training materials for document management processes, ensuring accuracy and timely revisions.

 Conduct employee training on accessing and utilizing project documentation through tools such as Procore and ACC.

 Qualifications:
 Diploma/ Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Project Management, Construction Management , or related field.

 Minimum 3 years of experience in the construction industry.

 Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in document control.

 Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint), Power BI, and project/document management platforms such as ACC, Procore, Aconex, or equivalent.

 Willingness to learn and adapt to new document control systems.

 Strong ability to develop guidelines and procedures, and lead project teams in successful implementation of document control processes.

 Demonstrated ownership of deliverables with the ability to work independently and collaboratively within diverse teams.

 Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

 High attention to detail, strong sense of urgency, and commitment to meeting timelines.

 Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.

 We are an industry leader in innovative memory and storage solutions transforming how the world uses information to enrich life   for all . jobs.title: SR ENGINEER, OMT PROD. OEE
jobs.description:
Our vision is to transform how the world uses information to enrich life for all .
 Micron Technology is a world leader in innovating memory and storage solutions that accelerate the transformation of information into intelligence, inspiring the world to learn, communicate and advance faster than ever.

 In the area, be responsible for a designated area with a minimum of five years of hands-on experience in the same or equivalent area, demonstrating deep understanding of area operations, constraints, and interactions to enable more efficient and insightful performance analysis. Experience or strong familiarity with equipment material handling and transfer mechanisms (e.g., tool-to-tool or intra-tool transport structures) is highly preferred, as it enables deeper loss interpretation and more effective improvement identification..
 Work closely with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) related to processes, equipment, and production to analyze overall machine performance and drive systematic improvements, while balancing both quality performance and maximum output objectives.
 Transform analysis results into actionable on-site improvement actions and actively support and execute efficiency improvement initiatives across multiple areas, collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure improvements lead to maximum sustainable output.
 Regularly conduct weekly/monthly OEE analyses to systematically identify performance gaps, linking losses to operational realities in the area, and propose specific, prioritized, and high-impact improvement recommendations.
 Be responsible for P2P (Plan-to-Performance) monitoring of the area, ensuring baseline performance aligns with planned goals, proactively identifying deviation risks, and supporting corrective actions to protect both output and quality performance.
 Assist in establishing and optimizing the area-level OEE indicator framework and analysis methodology to improve consistency, decision speed, and analysis efficiency across areas and sites.
 Compare machine or process performance across different sites to identify best-in-class efficiency improvement practices that are scalable and replicable across the Micron network.
 Collaborate and exchange ideas across regions with SMEs and Global Team experts, sharing analytical frameworks, best practices, and improvement outcomes to maximize overall network benefits.
 Establish and participate in OEE Task Forces based on operational or project needs, enabling rapid cross-area support, integration of resources, and delivery of time-sensitive improvement initiatives.
 Utilize SQL and/or Python for data analysis, automation, and systematic improvement of analytical efficiency and quality, based on individual capability and task requirements.

jobs.title: Sr. Substrates Development and Ramp Engineer
jobs.description:
Job Details:

 Job Description: 
 Supports management/senior leadership to incorporate process and quality improvements in Intel's supply chain and logistics strategy.

 Defines material inspection methodology, conducts studies related to cost control, process control, and production yield, and implements plans and programs to optimize supply chain.

 Supports product long range plan development by defining next generation methodology capabilities to support Intel's supply chain roadmap.

 Explores and benchmarks emerging technology in the industry. Contributes to Intel's future technology definition and requirements. Highlights gaps between roadmap strategy, manufacturing capability, and market demands and recommends solutions to addresses those gaps.

 Tracks supply demand trends, conducts root cause analysis to find opportunities for process and quality improvements, and collaborates with supply chain leads to implement solutions.

 Leads supplier selections for new business in partnership with commodity managers and technical/quality partners and drives product and purchase specification content to ensure commodity performance compliance.

 Performs alternate sourcing risk mitigation for single sourced commodities.

 Establishes control standards, determines KPIs, monitors performance against targets, and drives root cause analysis for supply chain issues to arrive at solutions.

 Drives supplier process window validation activities on critical process modules through all stages of development.

 Drives supplier improvements on quality, reliability, yield, and cost.

 Maintains quality standards and systems, creating relevant specifications to minimize variability and subjectivity to align with operational capability requirements.

 Leads quality excursion management and drives failure mode analysis with suppliers.

 Qualifications:
 BS, MS or PhD in science or engineering fields with minimum 8 years of experience in semiconductor (Fab, Substrate, Assembly) development or manufacturing environment is required.
 Strong skill required for supplier management, quality management, analytical problem solving, and influence in relevant fields of HVM.
 In-depth knowledge required on substrate manufacturing processes and operations, raw materials, packaging technologies, and quality and process control system.
 Fluent communication and articulation skills in business level English, strong presentation skills and ability to effectively communicate and interact with internally and supplier's management highly required.
 Strong ability to work in cross functional teams are required.

As an AI Solutions Engineering Intern at Intel, you will play a pivotal role in supporting the development of integrated AI solutions tailored to business and customer needs. Your work will involve collaborating with hardware and software teams to optimize solutions for AI use cases, ensuring reliability and scalability. By applying your understanding of AI frameworks, programming, and system design, you will help shape solutions that address the challenges and requirements of the AI and machine learning landscape.

jobs.title: Compute - Forward Deployment Engineer
jobs.description:
As a Field Development Engineer for our Compute Platform, you are the technical partner that helps customers get the most out of ai&’s PaaS infrastructure. Our compute platform is built for simplicity — developers and engineering teams should be able to deploy web applications, APIs, backend services, and AI workloads without managing the infrastructure underneath. Your job is to make that promise real for every customer you work with.

 You will work across a diverse customer base — from startups shipping their first production application to enterprises migrating complex workloads onto ai& infrastructure. You will own the technical relationship, architect the deployment, and stay close through go-live and beyond. You bring the platform expertise, the deployment patterns, and the hands-on technical depth to meet customers wherever they are and get them to production fast.

 This is a peer-level technical role. You are not handing customers a documentation link. You are sitting with their engineering team, understanding their stack, and designing the solution together. When things break you diagnose them. When customers do not know the best path forward you show them one. And everything you learn in the field comes back into ai& to make the platform better.

 Responsibilities

 Solution Architecture & Deployment Design Design deployment architectures on ai&’s compute platform that fit the customer’s application, team, and scale requirements. Own the solution from initial scoping through production deployment.

 Technical Customer Engagement Lead technical onboarding, architecture reviews, and deep-dive sessions with customer engineering teams. Operate as a technical peer to developers, platform engineers, and CTOs at both startups and enterprises.

 Platform Onboarding Get customers live on ai& compute quickly and correctly. Manage the technical onboarding process, resolve blockers, and ensure the first deployment experience sets the right foundation.

 Proof of Concept & Migration Support Lead technical POCs for enterprise prospects. Help customers migrate existing workloads from other platforms onto ai& infrastructure, identifying risks early and managing the transition cleanly.

 Performance & Scalability Guidance Advise customers on how to configure and optimize their deployments for performance, cost, and reliability. Help them understand how to scale on the platform as their usage grows.

 AI & ML Workload Support For customers deploying AI and ML workloads, provide additional technical guidance on model serving, inference optimization, and integration with ai&’s broader AI platform capabilities.

 Technical Troubleshooting Own issue resolution across the customer lifecycle. Diagnose problems at any layer — application, runtime, networking, infrastructure — and drive resolution quickly with internal engineering teams.

 Customer Feedback & Product Input Capture the technical signal you gather in the field and bring it back to the product and engineering teams. The friction customers hit, the features they need, the patterns that keep coming up — all of it should flow back into how we build.

 Reference Architectures & Enablement Produce reference architectures, deployment guides, and example configurations that help customers move faster and scale your expertise across the customer base.

 Requirements

 PaaS & Cloud Platform Experience You have worked with PaaS or cloud infrastructure platforms — Heroku, Render, Railway, AWS Elastic Beanstalk, Google App Engine, or similar. You understand how developers deploy applications on managed platforms and where they run into trouble.

 Application Deployment Depth Strong understanding of how web applications, APIs, and backend services are deployed and operated in production. You know about containerization, runtime environments, networking, databases, and the full stack that surrounds an application.

 Solutions Architecture Track Record You have designed and delivered end-to-end technical solutions for customers in a customer-facing technical role. You think in systems, you own the architecture, and you see deployments through to production.

 Enterprise & Startup Customer Fluency Comfortable working across both enterprise and startup environments. You adjust your approach depending on who you are talking to — a solo founder moving fast or a platform team at a large enterprise moving carefully.

 Troubleshooting Across the Stack You can diagnose problems at any layer — application code, runtime configuration, networking, infrastructure. You do not need to hand off to understand what is happening.

 AI & ML Familiarity Working familiarity with AI and ML workloads is a plus. You do not need to be an ML engineer but you should be comfortable having a technical conversation about model deployment and inference when the customer needs it.

 Relevant Tooling Strong command of at least one backend language. Familiarity with containers, CI/CD pipelines, cloud networking, and deployment tooling. Python proficiency is a plus.

 Great Team Spirit A mission-driven approach to engineering, valuing clear communication, hands-on execution, and collective success over individual silos.

jobs.title: AI - Forward Deployment Engineer
jobs.description:
As a Field Development Engineer at ai&, you are the most technical person in the customer relationship. You combine deep platform knowledge with the ability to go into any enterprise environment, understand what they are trying to build, and architect the solution that gets them there on ai& infrastructure.

 You will work with the most technically demanding customers we have, enterprises deploying AI at scale, startups pushing the boundaries of what agents can do, and engineering teams that need a peer-level technical partner, not a salesperson. You will own the solution architecture end to end: understanding the customer’s stack, designing the integration, driving deployment, and staying close through production. You will also build a distributed inference and compute architecture with a customer’s ML team and sitting down with their platform engineers to debug a latency issue in the serving layer.

 This role carries significant influence. The architectures you design become reference patterns. The feedback you bring back shapes the product roadmap. And the trust you build with customers becomes the foundation of long-term partnerships. We want someone who takes that seriously and operates with the technical depth and customer instinct to back it up.

 Responsibilities

 Solution Architecture Design end-to-end technical architectures that integrate ai&’s agent and inference platform into customer environments. Own the solution from initial scoping through deployment, ensuring it is correct, scalable, and production-ready.

 Technical Customer Engagement Serve as the primary technical point of contact for enterprise customers. Lead deep-dive architecture sessions, proof-of-concept engagements, and technical reviews. Operate as a peer to the customer’s most senior engineers.

 Platform Expertise Develop and maintain deep expertise across the full ai& platform — inference serving, model capabilities, agentic frameworks, and infrastructure. Be the person who knows it better than anyone outside the company.

 Proof of Concept & Benchmarking Lead technical proof-of-concept engagements with customers. Design benchmarks that demonstrate platform performance against customer workloads and use the results to guide architectural recommendations.

 Agentic Workflow Design Help customers architect and deploy agentic workflows on ai& infrastructure. Translate complex customer use cases into concrete, well-scoped implementation plans and build alongside them where needed.

 Technical Troubleshooting & Escalation Own technical issue resolution across the customer lifecycle. Diagnose problems at any layer of the stack, drive resolution with internal engineering teams, and communicate status clearly to the customer throughout.

 Customer Feedback & Roadmap Input Systematically capture and communicate the technical signal you gather in the field. Be the voice of the customer inside ai& and ensure product and engineering decisions are informed by real deployment experience.

 Reference Architecture & Enablement Produce reference architectures, integration guides, and example implementations that scale your expertise beyond the customers you directly touch.

 Requirements

 Solution Architecture Experience You have designed and delivered end-to-end technical solutions for enterprise customers in a solutions architect, field engineer, or equivalent role. You think in systems and you own the architecture through to production.

 AI Infrastructure Depth Deep familiarity with AI inference infrastructure, serving frameworks, and the systems that surround them. You understand how models are deployed, how serving stacks are built, and where they break under real workloads.

 Agentic Systems Knowledge You have worked with agentic frameworks and you understand the architectural patterns that make agent-based systems reliable at scale. You can design solutions that use ai&’s agentic platform to solve real customer problems.

 Enterprise Customer Fluency You have worked with demanding enterprise customers and you know how to earn the trust of senior technical stakeholders. You communicate with precision, handle ambiguity well, and push back constructively when needed.

 Performance & Benchmarking Experience designing and running technical benchmarks that demonstrate platform performance against real workloads. You know how to set up a POC that answers the right questions.

 Full-Stack Technical Range Comfortable across APIs, backend infrastructure, cloud environments, and ML systems. You can diagnose problems at any layer and you do not need to hand off to understand what is happening.

 Relevant Tooling Strong command of Python. Familiarity with inference frameworks, agentic libraries, REST APIs, and cloud deployment environments.

 Great Team Spirit A mission-driven approach to engineering, valuing clear communication, hands-on execution, and collective success over individual silos.

jobs.title: 社群行銷實習生 (Roo)
jobs.description:
About us

 Gogolook is a leading TrustTech company founded in 2012 and listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange in 2025 under the stock code 6902. With "Build for Trust" as its core value, the company has expanded its business from Asia to Europe and America. Gogolook’s AI technology is built on the world's largest database of digital scam data, encompassing phone numbers, websites, virtual currency wallet addresses, and other factors.

 The company provides diverse anti-scam and fintech services for both consumers and businesses. Its anti-scam offerings include the digital anti-scam app "Whoscall" and a range of enterprise scam prevention solutions in combination with "ScamAdviser."

 The Fintech BU empowers consumers through data-driven financial services and inclusive lending: Roo.Cash（袋鼠金融）offers transparent matchmaking for financial products like credit cards, while JUJI（招財麻吉）provides an innovative microloan service for rapid, convenient funding during urgent financial needs.

 A foundation member of the Global Anti-Scam Alliance (GASA), Gogolook has also teamed up with a number of institutes such as the Taiwan National Police Agency Criminal Investigation Bureau, the Financial Supervisory Service of South Korea, Thai Royal Police, the Fukuoka city and Shibuya City government, the Philippines Cybercrime Investigation and Coordinating Center, and the Royal Malaysia Police and state government to fight scam, dedicated to creating a "scam-free environment."

 Why you should join Gogolook

 Influential products: What we make are meaningful products that create values for society and defend against frauds.

 Emphasize self-growth: We encourage technical community activities, subsidize tickets for conferences and workshops so that learning is continuously supported by the company.

 Unleash your talent: We respect the professional opinions of everyone, encourage team members to discuss with each other, and make awesome products together.

 Transparent culture: We publicly share the company's information to all, every member can read and feedback, and become a part of participating in the proposal.

 Gogolook 旗下金融科技品牌「袋鼠金融 Roo.Cash 」 致力於落實 “安心理財，聰明消費” 的品牌價值。透過特點分析與比較，讓台灣消費者能輕鬆找到最適合自己的金融商品（信用卡/貸款/數位帳戶/證券基金/產險）與生活消費產品/服務（食衣住行育樂）。

 袋鼠金融社群： https://www.instagram.com/roo.cash_taiwan/

\n

 Mission:
 社群創意：發想有趣的創意並製作社群內容，有效針對潛在客戶進行產品曝光

 社群營運：針對金融理財相關主題在不同社群平台上，靈活運用適合的工具、功能與特定族群積極建立連結、深入互動

 競品洞察：觀察並分析競品動態，優化品牌社群的經營藍圖

 數據回饋：學習在不同工具所提供的數據中洞察市場脈絡，並將數據用於社群內容優化

 Requirements:
 對金融商品具有興趣，包含信用卡、證券、保險等

 喜愛創作並樂於分享，熟悉各社群平台

 時常追蹤熱門議題、熱門人物

 謹慎細心，了解如何觀察數據，並能夠運用 Excel 表梳理脈絡，抓出重點、提出優化方向

 自律性高、持續學習，擁有極高求知慾

 具備良好的溝通協調能力，可清楚表達個人邏輯思路

 對於事物保留思考空間，並彈性應對任何狀況

 具備影音剪輯工具使用經驗，如剪映、Final Cut、Adobe Premier 等

 投遞請附上社群經營、影音相關作品集

 Nice to have:
 熟悉 Facebook、Instagram、Threads 操作，有經營粉專經驗

 熟悉網路流行語言，善於想梗、製造話題

 熟悉信用卡、股市、保險類型頻道或網紅

 熟悉簡易平面設計工具操作，如 Canva

 熟悉影音剪輯輔助工具，包含音效庫、素材庫等相關工具

 熟悉 AI 工具應用，能運用 AI 協助內容發想、資料整理、文案撰寫與社群素材優化

 在這裡你可以獲得：

 了解社群演算法背後邏輯，針對不同平台製作內容、優化經營策略

 深入探索短影音製作邏輯，在趨勢下賺取流量紅利

 實際接觸品牌經營策略，提升品牌社群黏著度

 了解金融理財生態圈，吸收一輩子受用的理財知識

 上班時間：

 週一至週五平日 10:00-19:00，一週配合至少三天，實習時長至少可配合 6 個月

 可彈性遠端工作，依據工作安排配合進公司

\n NT$196 - NT$196 an hour

jobs.title: Senior Firmware System Engineer
jobs.description:
We are looking for an experienced Firmware System Engineer to test, debug and address solutions to release software to Production line and Customers at Taiwan. In this role, you will collaborate closely with engineering, production teams and customers to bring-up NVIDIA network products, ensuring safe software release to production and customers.

 The dynamic and fast-paced work environment will require you to excel in problem-solving and system-level debugging, all while fostering collaboration among exceptional engineers across NVIDIA's global sites.
  
 What you’ll be doing:
 Identify, diagnose, and addressing high-value problems during the product onboarding process, such as software compatibility, PCIe, security, network interoperability and communication issues between components

 Verify that all integrated components interact as intended. This includes functional testing to ensure software components work correctly on various hardware testing platforms

 Validate firmware features for production at hardware power-on stage

 Bridge between software, production and customer engineering teams

  
 What we need to see:
 BS.c in Electrical/Computer Engineering or equivalent experience and above

 4+ years of overall experience

 Strong system-level understanding and hands-on lab experience

 Excellent interpersonal and intercultural skills, including written and verbal communication in English

  
 Ways to stand out from the crowd:
 Knowledge in SW-HW interfaces, PCIe, memory subsystems, storage components, network applications, device drivers and real-time software

 Programming knowledge in Python/C/C++

 Deep understanding of computing architectures, hardware systems block diagrams and schematic sheets understanding

 Previous roles include networking technical lead, system validation, or customer application engineer positions.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

jobs.title: Facility Construction Project Engineer
jobs.description:
Our vision is to transform how the world uses information to enrich life for all .
 Micron Technology is a world leader in innovating memory and storage solutions that accelerate the transformation of information into intelligence, inspiring the world to learn, communicate and advance faster than ever.

 Project Oversight and Collaboration:  

 Provide strategic leadership and direction to the local Project Manager and construction management team.  

 Collaborate with the local team to develop and   maintain   a comprehensive project plan, including schedule, budget, and risk mitigation strategies.  

 Regularly review project progress,   identify   and address potential issues proactively.  

 Ensure clear and consistent communication with the Global Construction team and other collaborators on project status, risks, and decisions.  

 Global Integration and Standards:  

 Champion the company's global project management standards and guidelines, ensuring their implementation on the local project.  

 Collaborate with internal and external partners at the global level, including engineering, procurement, and equipment teams.  

 Manage communication and information flow between the local project and Global Construction headquarters.  

 Contract Management and Risk Mitigation:  

 Review and approve local contracts with subcontractors and vendors.  

 Monitor subcontractor performance, ensuring consistency to contractual obligations and quality standards.  

 Proactively   identify   and manage project risks, developing and implementing mitigation plans.  

 Quality and Safety:  

 Champion a culture of safety on the project site, ensuring all activities  stay in sync with   company safety protocols and local regulations.  

 Lead all aspects of the implementation of a robust quality assurance/quality control (QA/QC) program.  

 Conduct regular audits and inspections to verify alignment to quality standards.  

 Delineation of Responsibilities: Global vs. Local PM  

 Global PM:  Focuses on strategic oversight, global integration, and risk management. Provides guidance and direction to the local PM.  

 Local PM:  Manages day-to-day construction activities, coordinates with subcontractors, and ensures adherence to project plans and schedules. Reports to   the Global   PM.  

 Qualifications
 Possession of a Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Project Management, Construction Management, or  related field.

 Proven experience in managing large-scale construction projects.

 Strong knowledge of construction processes, building codes, and regulations.

 Outstanding problem-solving and organizational skills.

 Excellent communication and leadership abilities.

 Preferred Qualifications
 A Master's degree in a related field or equivalent professional experience.

 Professional certification in Project Management (PMP or equivalent).

 Experience working with international teams and managing projects in Taiwan.

 Familiarity with advanced construction technologies and balanced building practices.

 Ability to lead with optimism and encourage teams to achieve outstanding results.

 Bilingual ability in Chinese and English.

jobs.title: FE Capital Supplier Manager
jobs.description:
Our vision is to transform how the world uses information to enrich life for all .
 Micron Technology is a world leader in innovating memory and storage solutions that accelerate the transformation of information into intelligence, inspiring the world to learn, communicate and advance faster than ever.

 As a  Site Capital Supplier Manager you will be the primary category point of contact for supplier interactions, performance management, and negotiations. In this role, you will partner with internal stakeholders to build comprehensive view of supplier performance for continued sourcing success. You will be responsible for execution of category strategies and projects related but not limited to cost reduction initiatives, supply base optimization, and contract negotiation. This is accomplished through building and maintaining strategic supplier relationships to meet needs according to category strategies.

In this role, you will engage in supplier benchmarking analysis to formulate, lead and execute  projects to optimize cost, supply, and quality. Additional responsibilities include negotiating terms, conditions and pricing to leverage spend, leading and participating in department projects, serving as a primary contact for industry and supplier information, and acting as a procurement resource for other members within the organization.

This position also requires that you serve as the primary point of contact for resolving critical supplier issues and coordinate internal communication. You will also collect, consolidate and present site data and feedback for supplier quarterly business reviews.

 Role Responsibility & Tasks

 Manage Supplier Relationship
 Act as primary point of contact for site suppliers
 Perform commercial supplier qualification activities to ensure the commercial development of strategic suppliers
 Maintain collaborative relationships with supplier(s) while resolving supplier performance/capability issues
 Ensure suppliers comply with Micron's code-of-conduct programs and corporate social responsibility initiatives
 Communicate key supplier management updates and decisions to multiple levels in the organization
 Provide the voice of the supply base to Micron and provide the voice of Micron to the supply base
 Identify and Implement Supplier-Related Savings Levers
 Utilize data and should-cost models to drive cost improvement
 Serve as the subject matter expert for site suppliers sharing knowledge with key stakeholders
 Drive Negotiations with Suppliers for Sustaining Purchases
 Lead or participate in negotiations for contract  extensions and renewals
 Coordinate with Category Sourcing Manager on global negotiations or lead site sourcing events / RFQ process.
 Develop a contract strategy for site suppliers and create, negotiate, monitor and enforce contracted terms and conditions
 Execute and manage the purchase of goods and services in accordance with negotiated terms and conditions. 
 Maintain system records to enable inventory replenishment and support automated ordering processes.
 Ensure Supplier Performance Management
 Partner with the Category team and other sites to build comprehensive view of supplier performance
 Collect and relay site- specific priorities to suppliers
 Collaborate internally to drive and develop key performance measures/metrics for Strategic Suppliers and monitor supplier performance against these expectations to ensure continuous supplier improvement
 Lead in organizing and delivering on strategic supplier events, such as Quarterly Business Reviews
 Competencies

 Price of Entry – Must have at point of hire
 Teamwork
 Job Essential – Critical to role; can be developed over time or may have at point of hire
 Negotiating
 Planning
 Process Management
 Business Acumen
 Decision Quality
 Problem Solving
 Global Focus Area – Characteristics required for being successful in the global setting
 Cross-Cultural Resourcefulness

 Skills
 The following are the key functional skills supporting the success of the Site Capital Supplier Manager role.
 Data Analytics
 Continuous Improvement
 Systems and Tools
 Supplier Management
 Consensus Building
 Oral / Written Communication
 Goal Setting and Execution
 Multitasking
 Project Management
 Cost Analysis
 Current State Analysis
 Supplier Performance Management

 Education
 Required:
 Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent experience:
• Business
• Business Administration/Management
• Engineering
• Supply Chain Management
• Related field of study

 Desired:
 Master’s Degree or equivalent experience:
• Business
• Business Administration/Management
• Related field of study

Certificate:
• Professional Procurement Certification (ISM, APICS, other)
• Related field of study

 Experiences
 The following are examples of experiences to help prepare a team member for the Site Capital Supplier Manager role.
 Strong communication skills and the ability to be a persuasive advocate
 Experience as change agent that seeks out and advocates new and innovative solutions to meet the business needs
 Collaboration skills with peers in global category and stakeholder teams
 Able to work independently or with a cross functional team
 Demonstrated relationship management skills, including to navigate the organization, influence decisions and align with stakeholders
 Demonstrated analytical and problem solving skills with a forward-thinking approach
 Strong project management skills with the ability to lead or execute assigned tasks
 Proficient with Microsoft Office Suite applications

 Qualifications
 1-5 years’ experience in any of the following:
 Engineering
 Purchasing/Procurement
 Supplier/Partner Relations
 Supply Chain

 About Micron Technology, Inc.
 We are an industry leader in innovative memory and storage solutions transforming how the world uses information to enrich life   for all . With a relentless focus on our customers, technology leadership, and manufacturing and operational excellence, Micron delivers a rich portfolio of high-performance DRAM, NAND, and NOR memory and storage products through our Micron® and Crucial® brands. Every day, the innovations that our people create fuel the data economy, enabling advances in artificial intelligence and 5G applications that unleash opportunities — from the data center to the intelligent edge and across the client and mobile user experience.

jobs.title: FE Capital Supplier Manager
jobs.description:
Our vision is to transform how the world uses information to enrich life for all .
 Micron Technology is a world leader in innovating memory and storage solutions that accelerate the transformation of information into intelligence, inspiring the world to learn, communicate and advance faster than ever.

 As a  Site Capital Supplier Manager you will be the primary category point of contact for supplier interactions, performance management, and negotiations. In this role, you will partner with internal stakeholders to build comprehensive view of supplier performance for continued sourcing success. You will be responsible for execution of category strategies and projects related but not limited to cost reduction initiatives, supply base optimization, and contract negotiation. This is accomplished through building and maintaining strategic supplier relationships to meet needs according to category strategies.

In this role, you will engage in supplier benchmarking analysis to formulate, lead and execute  projects to optimize cost, supply, and quality. Additional responsibilities include negotiating terms, conditions and pricing to leverage spend, leading and participating in department projects, serving as a primary contact for industry and supplier information, and acting as a procurement resource for other members within the organization.

This position also requires that you serve as the primary point of contact for resolving critical supplier issues and coordinate internal communication. You will also collect, consolidate and present site data and feedback for supplier quarterly business reviews.

jobs.title: Senior SRE, Global Product Team
jobs.description:
In this position you’ll be joining a team that functions as an independent startup within CADDi. You’ll be creating a new application based on top of our core platform, CADDi Drawer, which manages large archives of engineering drawings, documents, and supply-chain data. 



 We have developed an initial version of the new product and are now preparing for its official release. As we move toward a full-scale launch, ensuring system reliability and scalability has become critical.

 To support this phase, we are looking for an SRE who can take ownership of the platform’s reliability—designing and improving monitoring, incident response, automation, and infrastructure practices. 

  

 Responsibilities

 
 As the SRE, design reliability, scalability, and operability from the ground up to support a rapidly growing product.

 Partner with Engineering teams to embed reliability and performance into product design.

 Build automation-first systems for infrastructure, deployments, scaling, and incident prevention to ensure sustainable operations.

 Design and operate internal platforms and DevOps practices (CI/CD, development and testing environments) to maximize developer productivity.

 Define, implement, and operate SLIs/SLOs aligned with product strategy, enabling data-driven reliability decisions. 

 Establish incident response processes with a strong focus on learning, prevention, and continuous improvement.

 Design and operate cloud infrastructure (GCP) with security and compliance. 

 Act as a leader shaping reliability culture and laying the foundation for the team.

 
  

 What You will Gain

 
 Experience in playing a central role in improving the reliability, scalability, and operational excellence of a new product at CADDi, from early-stage launch through growth.

 Experience providing significant value to society through the development of products that transform industrial structures

 SRE experience in an organization with global business operations

 Experience tackling challenging problems alongside highly motivated team members

 
  

 Requirements  

 
 9+ years of hands-on experience in software development

 7+ years of experience in an SRE team or a closely related role (e.g., platform engineering, reliability engineering)

 Experience designing, building, and operating architectures using cloud services

 Experience applying Infrastructure as Code (IaC) to manage scalable and repeatable infrastructure

 Hands-on operational experience with container orchestration technologies such as Kubernetes 

 Experience designing, building, and operating CI/CD pipelines, with a focus on reliability and delivery safety

 Experience developing and operating web applications, including production troubleshooting and performance considerations

 
  

 Nice to have

 
 Experience designing and operating distributed systems

 Experience in designing, developing, and operating backend systems for high-traffic web applications

 Experience designing, building, and operating systems on Google Cloud Platform (GCP)

 Experience designing and operating monitoring and observability platforms, such as Datadog

 Experience promoting and embedding SRE culture within an organization (e.g., team formation, enabling other teams, education, and advocacy)

 Hands-on SRE experience in an engineering organization with 50+ engineers

 Solid foundational knowledge of networking concepts

 Fluent business-level Japanese communication skills
 
 Examples include:
 
 Japanese Language Proficiency Test (JLPT) N2 level or equivalent, or

 Approximately 3 years of professional work experience in a Japanese-speaking environment

 


 


 
  

 Compensation 

 
 ¥9,500,000 ~ ¥16,000,000 annually

 
 Salary reviews will be conducted twice a year.

 The annual salary will be divided into 12 equal monthly payments.

 Stock option program available.

 


 Stock option





 
 We want to work with individuals who have this kind of mindset

 
 Individuals who understand our mission "Unleash the potential of manufacturing".

 Individuals who can confront essential challenges and take action with a sense of ownership to resolve them.

 Individuals who can perform their duties with a positive attitude and constructive discussions in fast-changing and highly uncertain situations.

 Individuals who can communicate and discuss with a respectful attitude, considering the context and resolution of others.

 
 Development Environment

 
 Frontend: TypeScript, React, Next.js

 Backend: Rust(axum),TypeScript, Node.js(Express,Fastify,NestJS)

 Machine Learning/ Algorithm: Rust, Python, OpenCV, PyTorch, TorchServe, Elasticsearch, Vertex AI

 Infrastructure: Google Cloud, Google Kubernetes Engine, Anthos Service Mesh, Istio, Cloudflare, Argo Workflows

 Event Bus: Cloud Pub/Sub

 DevOps: GitHub, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, Kustomize, Helm, Terraform, Datadog, MixPanel, Sentry

 Data: CloudSQL(PostgreSQL), AlloyDB, BigQuery, dbt, trocco

 API: GraphQL, REST, gRPC

 Authentication: Auth0

 Other tools: GitHub Copilot, Figma, Storybook

 Communication: Slack, Discord, JIRA, Miro, Confluence

 
 Hiring Process

 
 Application Review

 We’ll take a look at your application and contact you within X business days if we are interested.

 Coding Assignment/Technical Writing Sample

 1st Round Interview (Hiring Manager)

 2nd Round Interview (Engineering Manager)

 Final Round Interview (CTO/VPoE)

 
 *Please note that, depending on the situation, additional interviews or discussions may be proposed.

 *If desired, we can arrange casual interviews with employees even during the selection process. Please feel free to consult with us.

 *The average time from application to offer is about one month, but if you are in a hurry, please let us know. We will do our best to adjust the schedule to fit your job search timeline.

jobs.title: QA Manager (Osaka)
jobs.description:
As the QA Team Manager, you will lead quality assurance across multiple products, including our core product. You will be responsible for both people management and the planning and execution of quality strategies to ensure high product quality across the organization.

  

 Responsibilities

 
 Manage QA team members, including goal setting, performance evaluation, development, and conducting 1-on-1 meetings

 Define and drive the QA strategy and roadmap

 Design, improve, and optimize quality management processes throughout the SDLC, and promote test efficiency

 Develop and execute test automation strategies

 Collaborate with stakeholders, including Development and SRE teams, to share quality issues and drive improvements, contributing to overall organizational quality enhancement

 Lead QA hiring activities, including hiring plans, interviews, and onboarding

 Manage budget and resources

 
  

 What Makes This Role Attractive

 
 Engage with multiple products across the company from a “quality” perspective, gaining experience as a key player in both project execution and product development

 Be at the forefront of product growth and transformation, witnessing and shaping changes as they happen

 Join a culture that encourages proactive, offensive QA initiatives rather than passive quality control

 Work with significant autonomy within the product and QA teams

 Take on management challenges in a global environment

 
  

 Organization

 You will be part of the JPN-QA team within the Innovation & Engineering Division.

 There is also an IND-QA team based in India, and you will work closely with managers in other locations to carry out your responsibilities.

  

 Tools

 
 Task Management: ClickUp

 Test Case Management: TestRail

 Test Automation Framework: CodeceptJS

 CI: GitHub Actions

 
  

 Requirements

 
 At least 3 years of experience in team management

 At least 5 years of experience in web application testing and QA

 Hands-on experience as a QA engineer in test planning, design, and execution

 Experience in introducing and driving test automation initiatives

 Strong knowledge and practical experience in software quality management

 Japanese: Business-level proficiency

 English: Business-level or above

 
  

 Nice to haves

 
 Experience in building a QA team or scaling a QA organization

 Hands-on experience with test automation using frameworks such as Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright

 Experience integrating and operating tests within CI/CD environments

 Experience in web application development (backend and/or frontend)

 Management experience in a startup or agile environment

 Experience collaborating with global teams across different time zones and cultures

 
  

 Hiring process steps

 
 Document Screening

 Casual Interview (Japanese Language Check)

 First Interview

 Second Interview

 Third Interview

 Final Interview + Reference Checks

 Job Offer Meeting

jobs.title: Service Robot System Engineer
jobs.description:
Description

 
 In this role, you will be responsible for:

 
 Designing service robot systems for real-world environments (e.g., homes, retail stores, and logistics sites).

 Planning and executing proof-of-concept (PoC) studies and field experiments in the service robotics domain.

 Selecting, improving, and iterating on robot hardware used in the project.

 


 Requirements

 
 Minimum Qualifications

 
 M.S. in Robotics, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field

 Extensive hands-on experience with physical robotic platforms (e.g., mobile robots, manipulators such as UR5, Franka Emika, HSR, or humanoids).

 Demonstrated ability to control real robots using ROS / ROS2, including full-stack integration and deployment.

 Strong programming proficiency in C++ and Python, with the ability to contribute production-level code and perform system-level integration.

 Proven ability to work both independently and collaboratively in multidisciplinary research and engineering teams.

 


 Preferred Qualifications

 
 Ph.D. in Robotics, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field, or M.S. with 3+ years of equivalent industry or research experience.

 Publication record in top-tier robotics conferences or journals (RSS, CoRL, ICRA, IROS, TRO, IJRR).

 Experience participating in and/or receiving awards at international robotics competitions (e.g., RoboCup@Home).

 Willingness to conduct real-world validation experiments by using service robots in everyday life environments (e.g., at home).

 Experience leading or contributing to large-scale robot data collection or fleet management systems.

 Familiarity with robotic simulators (Isaac Sim, MuJoCo, or PyBullet) for training and evaluation.

 Experience integrating Sim2Real transfer or Vision–Language–Action (VLA) models onto real robotic systems.

 


 Leadership & Other Qualifications

 
 Leadership experience mentoring junior engineers and influencing stakeholders.

 Ability to lead multidisciplinary engineering teams.

 Experience working on complex hardware systems such as automotive, consumer electronics, or similarly sophisticated products.

 


 Benefits

 
 There are currently no comparable projects in the world that collect data and develop foundation models on such a large scale. As mentioned above, this is one of Japan’s leading national projects, supported by a substantial investment of 20.5 billion yen from NEDO.

 This position will play a crucial role in determining the success of the project. You will have broad discretion and responsibility, and we are confident that, if successful, you will gain both a great sense of achievement and the opportunity to make a meaningful contribution to society.

 Furthermore, we strongly encourage engineers to actively build their careers through this project—for example, by publishing research papers and engaging in academic activities.
